description_long: This is a classic red and white van with a distinctive split windshield and rounded body, reminiscent of mid-20th-century camper vans. The van features a checkered side panel, blue-rimmed wheels, and a pop-up roof section, suggesting it is designed for camping or mobile vending. The side panel includes a wooden serving counter that folds out, and the rear hatch is open, revealing a partially visible interior. The front displays a prominent 'VW' logo, round headlights, and a white bumper. The windows are large and numerous, providing ample visibility and light inside. The overall design is both functional and iconic, suitable for urban streets, parks, or event settings.
description: A red and white vintage-style van with a pop-up roof, checkered side panel, and fold-out wooden counter, featuring a classic split windshield and blue-rimmed wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split windshield, VW logo, round headlights, and partially open roof and side counter.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the checkered panel, pop-up roof, blue wheels, and open rear hatch.
description_view_2: Rear view with the open hatch, rear window, and extended wooden counter visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open pop-up roof, checkered panel, and full length of the wooden counter.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
